summary: A clip from a Fox News segment. A graphic shows a booking-style photo of a man under the banner ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT CHARGED IN VA BUS STOP STABBING, with a MONITORING: BEIRUT inset. The segment cuts to a woman with curly hair and eyeglasses interviewed via video link, labeled CHERYL SEALY MINTER; the banner reads VA POLICE WARNED STABBING SUSPECT WAS DANGEROUS.

script.scene: A booking photo appears under the banner ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT CHARGED IN VA BUS STOP STABBING.
A woman is interviewed via video link, labeled CHERYL SEALY MINTER; banner reads VA POLICE WARNED STABBING SUSPECT WAS DANGEROUS.
Continued interview footage with the FOX NEWS ALERT banner.

notable_text: ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT CHARGED IN VA BUS STOP STABBING; CHERYL SEALY MINTER; VA POLICE WARNED STABBING SUSPECT WAS DANGEROUS; FOX NEWS ALERT
